description: Look trendy and stay comfortable in the Snipper floaters from puma. This pair can be teamed with cargo shorts and tees for a cool casual look.UpperSynthetic uppers with woven straps on the forefoot and around ankles for comfort and protectionVelcro strap enclosures on the forefoot and on the ankle strap for tighteningDiagonal fabric strap attached to the ankle straps from the forefoot strapAnkle straps padded lightly to avoid shoe bitescat logo on the ankle strap and the forefoot strapMidsoleCushioned suede  footbed with fabric covering for all day comfortOutsoleRubber outsole with multi-directional pattern and scooped out grooves for superior grip and traction and better shock absorptionShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not machine wash
